budget.policy: Use this packet first. Expand only listed specs/code/evidence when phase or stale revision requires exact source.

task.title: Define CodeWiki outer planning loop
task.summary: Specify the automatic outer loop that turns user intent into wiki knowledge updates and roadmap tasks before task execution begins, with user approval only at decision checkpoints.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki has an automatic planning workflow for clarifying intent, gathering evidence when needed, updating knowledge, and creating roadmap tasks.
acceptance: Planning loop is documented as clarify/inspect/research-if-needed/update-knowledge/create-roadmap-tasks with automatic progression where safe.
Research is explicitly outside normal task execution and supports knowledge claims.
Roadmap tasks are created only after intended behavior and acceptance criteria are clear enough.
User-facing commands/prompts can start the outer loop, but the user does not manually trigger each stage.
The loop pauses for user input only when ambiguity, product choice, destructive change, or approval policy requires it.
non_goals: Turn CodeWiki roadmap into an external issue tracker.
Remove human approval from material product or architecture decisions.
verification: Review generated roadmap tasks for spec links, outcomes, acceptance, non-goals, and verification.
Run codewiki state refresh and confirm roadmap summary remains healthy.
Dry-run a planning request and confirm stages advance without manual command choreography.

delta.desired: Planning automatically creates durable knowledge and an executable roadmap before implementation starts.
delta.current: Workflow guidance exists but outer-loop responsibilities are not isolated or automated.
delta.closure: Add planning-specific skill/spec guidance and ensure new tasks follow it with minimal user command choreography.

specs.summary: User-facing workflow and status-surface expectations for codewiki.

evidence.summary: Verified automatic outer planning loop implementation in focused skill and client roadmap specs after final checks.
